description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Embedded build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: one for RaspberryPi64 and another commented out for RaspberryPi and RaspberryPi tests. The RaspberryPi64 job should run on an ubuntu-latest environment with an archlinux container, install dependencies, checkout code, build, deploy, and upload a tarball artifact. It should also create a GitHub release with the uploaded artifact when a tag is pushed or a continuous build is made.
